summary: P0 Bug Fix Verified: Account dropdowns across Finance modules now correctly show account names with balances instead of raw account IDs. All 6 test cases passed. Tested: CashBook (Internal Transfer From/To, Add Entry), Liabilities (Settle), Purchase Invoice (Pay), RecurringTransactions (New Template).
passed_tests: CashBook - Internal Transfer 'From Account' dropdown shows account names with balances (e.g., 'Petty Cash (₹21,945)')
CashBook - Internal Transfer 'To Account' dropdown shows account names with balances
CashBook - Add Entry 'Account' dropdown shows account names (e.g., 'Petty Cash', 'Bank of Baroda - Current')
Liabilities - Settle 'Pay From Account' dropdown shows account names with balances
Purchase Invoice - Pay 'Payment Account' dropdown shows account names with balances
RecurringTransactions - New Template 'Account' dropdown shows account names with balances
Account Summary Cards show account names (not IDs)
Transactions Table 'Account' column shows account names (not IDs)
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: ExecutionLedger.jsx line 1382 uses 'acc.account_name || acc.name' for payment account dropdown
VERIFIED: Liabilities.jsx line 704 uses 'account.account_name || account.name' for settle account dropdown
VERIFIED: CashBook.jsx lines 504, 528 use 'acc.account_name || acc.name' for internal transfer dropdowns
VERIFIED: RecurringTransactions.jsx line 745 uses 'acc.account_name || acc.name' for account dropdown
The fallback pattern (account_name || name) ensures backward compatibility with both API response formats
seed_data_creation: None - used existing accounts (Petty Cash, Bank of Baroda - Current, TEST_Test Bank Account)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Account dropdown bug fix verified. All Finance module dropdowns now show 'Account Name (Balance)' format instead of raw account IDs. Key accounts: Petty Cash (₹21,945), Bank of Baroda - Current (₹5,34,500), TEST_Test Bank Account (₹10,000).

bug_fix_verification.bug_description: Account dropdowns were showing account IDs (e.g., 'acc_d3cd5544') instead of account names
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Changed from 'acc.name' to 'acc.account_name || acc.name' in all affected components
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: PASSED - All dropdowns now show account names with balances
